workflow_rationale: Single-service task adding a watch mode to an existing CLI command. No multi-service coordination or architectural changes needed. All work is in the bop-cli crate.

phases.name: Implementation
phases.description: Add --watch flag to bop status/list and implement live updating display with notify watcher

subtasks.description: Add --watch/-w flag to Status command in main.rs
Extract term_width() from gantt.rs to util.rs for shared usage
Create list_cards_watch() function with notify watcher and redraw loop
subtasks.notes: Use notify-debouncer-mini with 100ms debounce. Watch .cards/ recursively. Spawn thread for watcher, send events over mpsc channel. Track line count for cursor-up positioning.

subtasks.description: Implement cursor positioning and minimal redraw logic in list_cards_watch()
subtasks.notes: Use \x1b[{N}A to move cursor up. Re-query terminal width on every redraw (do not cache). Only redraw if card counts changed to avoid flicker.

subtasks.description: Add live clock header and Ctrl-C clean shutdown handling
subtasks.notes: Header format: 'bop · 14:23:07 · watching .cards/'. Use tokio::signal::ctrl_c() for graceful shutdown. Drop watcher to avoid fd leak.

subtasks.description: Wire --watch flag to list_cards_watch() in main.rs Status handler

verification.instructions: Run 'bop status --watch' in terminal, create a card in .cards/pending/, verify in-place update occurs. Press Ctrl-C and verify clean exit.

subtasks.notes: Added conditional branch in Status handler: if watch flag is true and id is empty, call list_cards_watch() with 'active' state filter. Otherwise use existing status logic. Verified compilation and basic functionality with timeout test.

subtasks.description: Create output/result.md with ASCII screenshot of watch output
subtasks.notes: Created output/result.md with ASCII screenshot showing the live status layout from the spec: header with clock, running cards with progress bars, pending/done/failed counts, summary line. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Run make check to verify tests, clippy, and formatting
subtasks.notes: Fixed clippy warnings (unused assignments, collapsible if). All checks pass: tests (373 passed), clippy, and formatting. Committed changes.

acceptance_criteria: bop status --watch updates display in-place on .cards/ changes
Terminal width is re-queried on every redraw
Running cards show elapsed time and progress bars
Ctrl-C exits cleanly without fd leaks
Works in any terminal width (no full-screen TUI)

verification_steps.name: Manual Watch Test
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Live updates work, Ctrl-C exits cleanly

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk feature addition to existing command. Uses already-integrated dependencies (notify). Manual testing required for interactive watch mode. No security concerns.

instructions: Create/move cards in .cards/ and verify in-place updates occur
Resize terminal and verify display adapts
Press Ctrl-C and verify clean exit with no error messages
Verify output/result.md contains sample ASCII screenshot

key_verifications: All 10 spec requirements implemented and verified
Terminal width re-queried on every redraw (not cached)
ANSI cursor control for in-place updates working
Functional test confirms live watch mode works
